ham.subject: Out of Office: On Leave Until 15th July
ham.body:
Hello,

Thank you for your email. I am currently out of the office on leave and will not return until 15th July. During this period I will have limited access to my email.

If you need immediate assistance, please contact my colleague Rahul Mehta at rahul.mehta@university.edu or call the department line at +91-22-5555-1234.

I will respond to your message as soon as possible upon my return.

Best regards,
Ananya Sharma
Assistant Professor, Department of Physics
University of Delhi

spam.subject: URGENT: Your Scholarship Offer Pending Verification Required
spam.body:
Dear Applicant,

Congratulations! Your application for the prestigious Global Scholars Fellowship has been approved by the University Finance Office.

To receive the full scholarship amount of INR 3,00,000, you must verify your account details within the next 48 hours. Failure to do so will result in automatic cancellation of your award.

Please click on the following link to confirm your personal information and complete the payment process:

<URL>

Once verified, the scholarship funds will be credited to your account within 5 business days. This step is mandatory – the University will not release the funds without your confirmation.

Thank you for choosing our institution. We look forward to welcoming you as a scholarship recipient.

Best regards,

S. K. Patil
Head, Scholarship & Financial Aid
University Finance Office
